arts.ttl: Manchester turns YELLOW as a sea of Bodo/Glimt fans arrive in force to cheer on the Norwegian side against Man United in Ruben Amorim's Old Trafford debut
arts.sum: Fans of the Norwegian outfit, who currently sit above the Red Devils in the Europa League table ahead of Thursday's clash at Old Trafford, were in high spirits before kick-off.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Ruben Amorim facing Man City battle for £66.5m favourite?
arts.sum: Manchester United must reportedly fend off the threat of Manchester City to land Sporting Lisbon and Denmark midfielder Morten Hjulmand in 2025.

arts.ttl: Manchester United and Tottenham sending scouts to Europa League game – Leicester making trip too
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham are sending scouts to watch tonight’s Europa League clash between FC Midtjylland and Eintracht Frankfurt and will be joined by Leicester City. That’s according to Tipsbladet, who report that Manchester United, Tottenham and Leicester will all have representatives in Central Jutland to watch the European clash.
